name: Noel the Mortal Fate Complete Edition
short_description: This is a tale of revenge — of a demon, a girl, and their companions. After seven years of development, the popular dark suspense adventure "Noel the Mortal Fate" finally arrives as a complete edition with all 13 seasons included, fully upgraded and with no extra charges.
detailed_description:
New DLC Available


Featured DLC


About the Game

The story takes place in the fictional city of Laplace. Noel Cerquetti, a noble young lady from a prestigious family, loses everything as a consequence of a demonic contract she was tricked into. Sharing the same goal of revenge, the two eventually gather more allies and confront powerful enemies.

However, the unprecedented turmoil that began in this small city gradually escalates into a great war.

Game Overview

Gameplay Experience: Legendary Action-Adventure

  • Explore maps and immerse yourself in story and action
    Players control characters to freely roam maps, unfolding the story and engaging in battles.

  • Cross-genre gameplayStrategy simulation, racing action, crafting, casino card games... From the mid-game onward, each chapter introduces new systems, providing a consistently fresh experience.

  • Tactical boss battles with “STANCE” system
    Switch between stances like aggressive and surprise attacks depending on the situation, manage cooldowns, and strategize your skills.

Exclusive Features in the Complete Edition

  • S1–7 fully upgraded to console edition level
    Includes enhanced cutscenes, additional story content, improved UI, and rebalanced gameplay from the Nintendo Switch / PS4 / Xbox versions—now fully realized on PC at console-quality standards.

  • S8 to Final Part + Special Episode fully included with no extra charges
    Previously paid DLC content, including Season 8 to the Final Part and the special story "Season 3.5," is now fully included. Enjoy the complete story from beginning to end without additional costs.

  • Diverse Gameplay Systems
    The greatest appeal of this title lies in its diverse gameplay systems. Beyond the strategic battles that constantly require switching "stances," the game introduces new systems as the story progresses. From crafting in snowy mountains, to strategic simulations that test your bonds, to intense card games in the casino, and even thrilling car action sequences — each chapter offers a new gameplay experience.
    Conquer these varied challenges and lead Noel down her path of revenge.

About Special Episode Season 3.5

Previously only available on the Nintendo Switch version, "Season 3.5" is included.
In this story bridging the Burrows and Jillian arcs, Noel becomes a detective to investigate the owner of the "hideout." Choices and exploration affect dialogues, adding deep replay value.

Main Characters

  • Noel Cerquetti:
    A noble lady from the prestigious Cerquetti family, daughter of pianists. She vows revenge against Burrows through a pact with Caron. Stubborn and unwavering once she decides on a path.

  • Caron:
    One of the "Great Devils" capable of granting any wish. The instigator who proposed revenge to Noel. Furious when called a "bird head."

For players who already own Season 1–7

  • You can upgrade to this complete pack at the current price.

  • Experience the latest content and balancing from the console version on PC.

  • Please note: Save data from the previous PC version cannot be transferred.

After seven years of thrilling and unexpected developments that captivated fans, Noel the Mortal Fate finally unveils its complete story.

  • Streaming is OK!
    Feel free to stream on YouTube, Twitch, NicoNico, X, or any other platform.
    We’d be happy if you could include a link to this page in your video description.

  • Monetization
    Using platform monetization features (YouTube Partner Program, Super Chats, etc.) is totally fine!

  • Notes
    Please refrain from doing anything illegal or causing trouble to others.
